# Lindcott Armory

> Lindcott Armory is a free mobile app for iOS and Android that lets gun owners privately track their firearms, ammunition, sessions, and maintenance records. No account required. No ads. No data brokers. Works offline.

Built by a competitive shooter, reloader, and aspiring gunsmith.

## Pages

- [Home](https://lindcottarmory.com/): App overview, features, early access signup, and charter member offer
- [Field Guide](https://lindcottarmory.com/field-guide): Reference hub for firearms knowledge
- [Cartridge Library](https://lindcottarmory.com/cartridge-library): Searchable database of 323 firearm cartridges with ballistics, history, military adoption timelines, and specifications
- [Powder Library](https://lindcottarmory.com/powder): Searchable database of 320+ reloading powders with burn rate rankings, powder type, best use by application, temperature sensitivity, and recommended calibers
- [History of Firearms](https://lindcottarmory.com/history): Visual timeline of 45 landmark firearms from the flintlock musket to the XM7
- [Military Firearms Timeline](https://lindcottarmory.com/military): 85 service weapons across every major military, explorable by country, year, or role
- [Stolen, Lost & Destroyed](https://lindcottarmory.com/stolen): Step-by-step guide for what to do when firearms are stolen, lost, or destroyed — police reports, insurance claims, ATF procedures
- [Privacy Policy](https://lindcottarmory.com/privacy): Privacy policy and terms of service

## Key Features

- Track every gun, round count, session, and maintenance record in one place
- AI assistant that answers questions about your own vault using your data
- Private by design — data stays on your device
- Free to download, no account required to start
- Available on iOS and Android
- Charter member offer: sign up for early access, get 3 months of Pro free at launch

## Contact

support@lindcottarmory.com
